---
title: "Session 1: Electricity is Magic"
subtitle: "Until You Know the Trick"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../slides_template/assets/sdaia.scss]
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    controls: true
    progress: true
    center-title-slide: true
    view-distance: 6
    preload-iframes: false
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-image: "../slides_template/assets/anim.svg"
      data-background-opacity: "0.08"
      data-background-size: "cover"
---

# Session 1 {.sdaia-dark background-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #1C355E, #00C9A7)"}

Electricity is Magic — Until You Know the Trick

## Agenda

- **Intro** — What is a Robot?
- **Part 1** — The Water World
- **Part 2** — Zooming In
- **Part 3** — The Bridge (Water ↔ Electrons)
- **Part 4** — But They Don't Touch
- **Part 5** — The Rules of Electricity *(+ 🔥 Ohm's Law for the curious)*
- **Part 6** — Components: Bulb, Motor, Switch
- **Part 7** — The Valve & The Transistor *(+ 🔥 Transistor math for the curious)*
- **Part 8** — 0s, 1s, and Arduino *(+ 🔥 Binary counting for the curious)*
- **Part 9** — The Lab: Traffic Light & Automatic Light
- **Part 10** — Summary & AI Onboarding

> 🔥 **Bonus sections** are for students who want to go deeper — they are optional and skippable.

{{< include session1/part0-what-is-a-robot.qmd >}}

{{< include session1/part1-water-world.qmd >}}

{{< include session1/part2-zooming-in.qmd >}}

{{< include session1/part3-the-bridge.qmd >}}

{{< include session1/part4-but-they-dont-touch.qmd >}}

{{< include session1/part5-the-math.qmd >}}

{{< include session1/part6-components.qmd >}}

{{< include session1/part7-the-valve.qmd >}}

{{< include session1/part7_5-design-principles.qmd >}}

{{< include session1/part8-zeros-ones-arduino.qmd >}}

{{< include session1/part9-the-lab.qmd >}}

{{< include session1/part10-bringing-it-all-back.qmd >}}
